core.label: J Language
core.description: APL's successor with ASCII notation for array programming.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install J from jsoftware.com. J uses ASCII characters instead of APL's special symbols.

topics.label: Arrays & Ranks
topics.description: Everything is an array. Rank determines how verbs apply to sub-arrays.

topics.label: Verbs (Functions)
topics.description: Monadic (one arg) and dyadic (two args). + - * % for arithmetic.

topics.label: Tacit Programming
topics.description: Point-free function composition with forks and hooks. Define functions without naming arguments.

topics.label: Iota & Shape
topics.description: i. for iota (generate integers), $ for shape/reshape.

topics.label: Explicit Definitions
topics.description: verb define / monad define for named functions with arguments.

topics.label: File I/O & Libraries
topics.description: Read files, load addons, and use J's standard library.
